creator: dan@obluda.cz
text:
(In reply to Adam Weinberger from comment #2)
> Dan, please submit your patches as patches (i.e. output from diff)... it's
> harder to review it this way.

I considered them so different, e.g. diff so unreadable to be useful (and it's not so hard to run diff by self). But OK, I will submit future PR as diffs despite it.

> In addition to your patch not updating distinfo, you didn't resolve that
> problem, so the port is still broken.
 
Please read and follow 'Fix' instructions. The problem you mentioned has been addressed and solved here.
